title: catalpa × hybrida f. purpurea
intro: Catalpa × hybrida f. purpurea, also known as the purple catalpa, is a hybrid ornamental tree resulting from the cross between the Northern Catalpa (Catalpa speciosa) and the Southern Catalpa (Catalpa bignonioides). It is known for its fragrant, showy purple flowers and heart-shaped leaves. The medicinal properties of Catalpa × hybrida f. purpurea include its ability to be used as a mild expectorant and anti-inflammatory agent, while also exhibiting antimicrobial properties. The herbal preparations of this plant can be consumed as a tea to alleviate respiratory issues and promote overall health, with benefits including relief from coughs, congestion, and bronchitis.
